name: Jonathan Liu

research_experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant (Embedded Systems)
research_experience.company: Sensors, Energy, and Automation Lab (SEAL) at University of Washington
bullets: Assisted in developing a PPG sleepiness detection system using machine learning algorithms to classify fatigue levels from heart biometrics in safety-critical environments.

work_experience.title: Electrical Systems Engineer
bullets: Designed, assembled, and validated electrical power and control systems for a Mars Rover prototype.

work_experience.title: Technical Lead (Drone Hardware Engineer)
bullets: Led recruitment and managed development lifecycle of three custom PCBs (Flight Controller, ESC, PDB).
Designed a custom PCB (STM32H743) featuring DSHOT600, redundant power sensing, and telemetry.
Architected a companion computer system using Jetson Orin Nano and Pixhawk 6C.
Implemented serial protocols (UART, I2C, SPI, CAN) for interfacing external peripherals.
Developed an automated thrust stand using Arduino for hardware-in-the-loop testing.

work_experience.title: Autonomous Driving Intern
bullets: Developed autonomous flight and landing systems for XPENG X3 flying car.
Validated LiDAR sensor fusion data and trained AI models for autonomous landing.

projects.name: Custom Flight Controller PCB Design (Husky Robotics)
projects.description: Designed and implemented a custom flight controller PCB (STM32H743) with DSHOT600, redundant power sensing, and telemetry for a drone system.

projects.name: PPG Sleepiness Detection System (SEAL Lab)
projects.description: Assisted in developing a fatigue detection system using PPG biometrics and machine learning for real-time safety monitoring.

projects.name: Automated Thrust Stand (Husky Robotics)
projects.description: Developed an Arduino-based automated thrust stand for optimizing drone propulsion efficiency by 25%.

resume_gaps: No gaps explicitly mentioned in the provided resume.
